item.title: DTCC begins July pilot to tokenize Russell 1000 stocks, ETFs, and U.S. Treasuries with BlackRock, Goldman Sachs, and JPMorgan
EU MiCA transitional period ended July 1; unlicensed crypto-asset service providers must cease EU operations
SEC places three crypto rules on July 2026 agenda: broker-dealer capital, digital asset offerings, and market structure
Open USD Stablecoin (OUSD) launches backed by 140-firm coalition including Stripe, Visa, Mastercard, BNY Mellon, and Coinbase
Crypto industry loses $955M to 207 hacking incidents in H1 2026, a record number of attacks in a six-month span
Crypto protocols lose $35M in one week as BonkDAO, Bonzo Lend, and Summer.fi suffer exploits
BonkDAO attacker drains $20M DAO treasury through governance token accumulation without exploiting smart contract code
Security researchers identify vulnerability that could have exposed $70B in crypto assets to theft
Ill Bloom wallet vulnerability exploited, draining more than $5M in cryptocurrency
Bank of America authorizes 15,000 financial advisors to recommend spot Bitcoin ETFs to clients
BlackRock expands institutional digital asset suite with launch of Bitcoin Income ETF
JPMorgan deepens crypto integration with new Bitcoin-backed securities product
Stablecoin issuers become significant buyers of U.S. Treasuries as Genius Act regulatory framework takes hold
